title: A Sherpa Survived 6 Days Alone on Everest. His Family Says He Was Abandoned.
summary_full: Dawa Sherpa, 57, was found alive on Thursday, nearly a week after he was last seen on the mountain. His wife says more could have been done to find him sooner.
summary_public: Dawa Sherpa, 57, was found alive on Thursday, nearly a week after he was last seen on the mountain. His wife says more could have been done to find him sooner.
